overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a red-haired character exploring a misty mountain temple environment. The character walks along a wooden viewing platform overlooking a fog-filled valley with an ancient gnarled tree, then approaches a traditional East Asian wooden temple structure with hanging lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain temple viewing platform overlooking misty valley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden platform, observing the misty valley and ancient tree

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank flooring of the mountain walkway
rustic wooden fence railing along the cliff edge
massive twisted pine tree with white cloth wrapping growing from the cliff
fog-filled valley with dense green forest below
distant mountain slopes covered in evergreen trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden viewing platform attached to a mountainside, with dense forest filling the misty valley below. An ancient gnarled tree with a cloth wrapping grows from the cliff edge to the right, while wooden railings line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple exterior walkway with traditional wooden architecture

events.description: approaching the traditional wooden temple building, moving from open platform to sheltered walkway under the eaves

agents.ego_description: continuing along the platform as it curves toward the temple entrance, passing under the eaves and alongside the temple wall

entered.detail: traditional East Asian temple structure with dark wooden walls and tiled roof
extended wooden eaves providing shelter over the walkway
traditional paper lanterns suspended from the temple eaves

segments.scene_description: The character rounds the corner of the platform where a large traditional wooden temple structure comes into view on the right. Walking under the temple's overhanging roof and past hanging lanterns, the ancient tree falls behind as the path continues alongside the temple wall with the misty valley still visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountainside path that transitions from a wild, misty cliffside into the structured architecture of an ancient temple. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden viewing platform, passing an ancient gnarled tree wrapped in cloth that clings to the cliff edge above a dense, fog-filled forest. As the character rounds a corner, the open vista of the valley shifts to the left to make room for a large traditional wooden temple structure appearing on the right. The camera then glides under the temple's overhanging roof and past glowing hanging lanterns, leaving the ancient tree behind. Finally, the path continues alongside the weathered temple wall while the misty valley remains visible in the periphery.
